documents.topic: Design for equation, hash, and comparison primitives unification

DECISION (v1.0.0): Protocol upgraded to admit ~Escapable conformers in addition to ~Copyable. Borrowing-parameter shape supports ~Escapable Self correctly. SE-0499 alignment: stdlib counterpart in Swift 6.4 is also ~Copyable & ~Escapable-permissive. Existing Copyable + Escapable conformers unaffected.
